message:
chore(ci): refresh test reports and add PERF-3X bead coverage gate

Regenerate CI artifacts with updated timestamps from latest test run:
- Cross-platform matrix reports (platform_events, platform_report)
- Extension conformance reports (CONFORMANCE_REPORT, conformance_summary)
- Full suite gate artifacts (certification, preflight, waiver audit)

Add new PERF-3X bead-to-artifact coverage audit gate (perf3x_bead_coverage)
to the certification pipeline — validates 7 PERF-3X bead coverage rows
with complete unit/e2e/log evidence paths. Gate is non-blocking but
tracked in the certification events and verdict.

Total gates: 14→15, passed: 13→14 (ext_must_pass still skipped).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
